items.name_en: Sunshine Small Tote, fabric material, decorated with FF pattern jacquard, Sandstone FEND1 ROMA leather lettering. Sandstone organic glass hard handle. Features a spacious lined interior pocket, sandstone leather trim and gold metal hardware. Equipped with two handles and a detachable shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear. Model 8042 Dimensions 16.5*5*17cm

items.name_en: The iconic Baguette medium handbag features a flap design with FF magnetic closure. Lined with a zip pocket. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody. Mirror effect silver leather material. Decorated with FF embossed pattern. Palladium metal finish. Size 26cm 0191MM85

items.name_en: The new large size First is here!!
items.name_cn:
The new large size First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag under his direction, revolutionizing the previous silhouette. The metal trim, large Logo lock, and body design combine architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at a dinner party, and chic for a shoulder carry!
Large 127B108 Dimensions 32.5x15x23cm
Small 129B98 Dimensions 26x9.5x18cm

items.name_en: The term 'BAGUETTE' commonly refers to a 'baguette bread', but in the fashion world, it is the name of a classic FENDI handbag, known as the 'Fendi Baguette'. 'FENDI' is a renowned Italian fashion brand famous for high-end leather goods, clothing, and accessories. 'ROMA' means 'Rome' in Italian; here it likely refers to the brand's association with the city of Rome, such as its origins. Rome is a key city in Italy's fashion industry, with many brands having deep historical and cultural roots there. Model number 1979.
